Since test case only specifies shape/dtype without data, the root cause is semantic invalidity — fix by reducing to 2D batch (..., N, N) with guaranteed symmetry, e.g., shape [6, 3, 3] and explicit symmetric construction; however per constraints, we adjust shape to standard 3D batch [n, N, N] and add dtype consistency.
